Design a solution for finding the k-th smallest element in an unsorted array in linear time on average. Discuss its time complexity and space complexity, and any edge cases you'd consider.
Explain how a real-time operating system's scheduler might differ significantly from a general-purpose OS scheduler. Provide an example scenario where the choice of scheduler is critical and why.

Describe the ACID properties in detail. How do two-phase locking (2PL) and multi-version concurrency control (MVCC) contribute to achieving isolation and atomicity, respectively? Discuss their respective trade-offs.

Imagine you are designing a new reliable data transfer protocol over a wireless link with inherently high packet loss. What modifications or additions would you make to the standard TCP mechanisms, and why?
Provide an example of a problem that is known to be undecidable in Theory of Computation. Justify why it's undecidable and explain the practical implications for algorithm design.
Compare and contrast B-trees and B+ trees in detail. In what specific applications or data access patterns is a B+ tree significantly more advantageous, and why?

You are tasked with optimizing a memory-intensive application. Discuss how understanding cache coherence protocols, cache line size, and techniques like data prefetching could help in improving overall performance.

Explain the different types of hazards that can occur in a pipelined processor. Propose a specific strategy to mitigate each type of hazard and discuss the performance implications or trade-offs of your proposed solutions.

Given a graph, explain the fundamental difference between finding an Euler path and a Hamiltonian path. Discuss the known computational complexity of determining the existence of each, and why one is significantly harder than the other.

During the code generation phase of a compiler, what are some common peephole optimizations performed? Illustrate with an example how such optimizations improve the efficiency or performance of the generated machine code.

What is graph and its representation?
